message:
Add command executor mock infrastructure (P3.1)

Created internal/testutil/executor.go with:
- CommandExecutor interface for abstracting exec.Command
- RealExecutor for production use (wraps actual exec.Command)
- MockExecutor for testing with configurable output/errors
- CommandSequenceMock for testing multi-step command sequences

Features:
- Thread-safe call recording with mutex
- OutputFunc for dynamic output based on command
- Helper methods: WasCalled, WasCalledWith, LastCall, Reset
- RunWithInput support for stdin testing

All 33 tests pass with 100% coverage on executor.go.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code)
